highlights.title: Local-first AI reading companion
highlights.description: Yomitomo's first release: import articles, read with table of contents and typography controls, and keep data on your computer.

highlights.title: Highlights, annotations, and discussions
highlights.description: Select text to create highlights, add annotation types, continue with comments, and maintain discussion threads.

highlights.title: AI companions and close reading
highlights.description: Configure reading assistants to annotate source selections or orchestrate multi-assistant chapter reading.

highlights.title: Library and stats
highlights.description: Save articles, annotations, comments, and reading state while building local reading trends.
